hero.headline: Designing clearer SaaS products for complex work.
hero.description: I'm a product designer and frontend developer with 6+ years of experience designing and shipping SaaS platforms. Most recently I was UX/UI Lead at FourJaw, shaping product direction through research, analytics, design systems, and implementation.
hero.framing: I do my best work where the workflow is messy, the product has grown quickly, and users need clarity more than novelty. My role is usually to find the friction, simplify the system, and help ship the improvement properly.

steps.title: Find the real friction
steps.description: I use interviews, usability testing, and behavioural analytics to understand where users are getting stuck and why.

steps.title: Simplify the product
steps.description: I map workflows, tighten journeys, and improve hierarchy so complex tasks feel easier to understand and complete.

steps.title: Design to ship
steps.description: Because I work comfortably in frontend code, I design with implementation in mind and stay close to delivery.

whatIEnjoy.title: What I Enjoy Working On
items: SaaS products with complex workflows, data-heavy interfaces, or multiple user contexts.
Teams that want tighter collaboration between discovery, design systems, and frontend delivery.
Platforms where analytics, research, and product judgement can guide meaningful UX improvements.

workIntro: Examples of product, UX, and frontend thinking applied to clearer workflows, stronger systems, and better day-to-day usability.
writingIntro: I occasionally write about product design, UX, accessibility, and what it takes to make digital products clearer in practice.

linkedin.title: For roles, recommendations, and a straighter career summary, find me on LinkedIn.
linkedin.description: It’s the best place to see the formal version of my background across product design, SaaS, frontend delivery, and teaching.

contact.title: If you need a product designer who can think in systems and work close to implementation, get in touch.
contact.description: I'm open to product design roles, UX-focused frontend work, and thoughtful collaborations on SaaS products that need clearer journeys and stronger UX.
